signals.raw: IMF's April 2 Article IV consultation forecasts minimal Fed rate cuts in 2026 (fed funds from 3.6% to 3.4%), GDP at 2.4%, inflation at 2.6% end-2026 amid 7-8.5% tariffs dragging growth; Powell noted steady policy in January.[2]
